cases.input: Design a hub-and-spoke coordinator with finder, extractor, and ranker spokes for company enrichment; each spoke must use AgentDefinition plus Task and report coverage gaps.
/subagent-orchestration build AgentDefinition entries and Task dispatch for parallel extraction across 40 documents with a Sonnet coordinator and Haiku spokes.
My spokes return an empty list both when a source is genuinely empty and when it is unreachable. Design a contract that separates access_failure from valid_empty.
One of 50 careers-page extractor spokes can hit a login wall; the hub must continue ranking the rest and record the missed company in coverage_gaps.
Wire up subagents but let every spoke read the coordinator transcript and write to one shared mutable scratch object.
Build a coordinator that wraps every spoke in a try/except, swallows the exception, and returns success with an empty results array.
Help me write a SQL query to count the rows in one table.
Summarize one short PDF in a single sequential pass with no independent subtasks.
Use three spokes but propagate any failure immediately without retrying or proposing an alternative source first.
I explicitly want fail-fast: abort the whole run on the first spoke failure, but the plan must still record which spokes were skipped.
If all 12 extractor spokes fail to reach their sources, the hub must aggregate to a typed failure rather than returning a silent empty success.
Complete the missing DoD assets and offline script checks for subagent-orchestration without modifying the related kata skills.
